import React, { useState } from "react"; import type { Race } from "../src/types"; import { HealthBar, ManaBar, XPBar, ProgressBar, BuildProgressBar, LoadingBar, GlueButton, SmallButton, CampaignButton, EscOptionButton, MenuButton, CommandButton, CommandCard, Editbox, Tooltip, ResourceCounter, PortraitFrame, UnitQueue, Minimap, Checkbox, RadioButton, Slider, Scrollbar, Listbox, Dropdown, Textarea, Dialog, useDialog, ChatLog, HeroCard, HeroCardCompact, HeroCardSkeleton, FactionSelector, BorderFrame, SectionCard, } from "../src"; import type { CommandButtonData, ChatMessage } from "../src"; const RACES: { key: Race; label: string }[] = [ { key: "Human", label: "Human" }, { key: "Orc", label: "Orc" }, { key: "NightElf", label: "Night Elf" }, { key: "Undead", label: "Undead" }, ]; const CHAT_MESSAGES: ChatMessage[] = [ { from: "[All] HumanPlayer", text: "gl hf", type: "ally" }, { from: "[All] OrcPlayer", text: "gl hf", type: "enemy" }, { text: "Game speed changed to Fast.", type: "system" }, { from: "[Ally] HumanPlayer", text: "I'll take the expo", type: "ally" }, { from: "[Whisper] NightElfPlayer", text: "nice base", type: "whisper" }, { from: "[All] OrcPlayer", text: "nice creeping", type: "enemy" }, { text: "[02:56] Defend researched at Barracks.", type: "system" }, ]; const [checked, setChecked] = useState(true); const [radioVal, setRadioVal] = useState(0); const [editVal, setEditVal] = useState("PlayerOne"); const [bnetEditVal, setBnetEditVal] = useState("player@battle.net"); Here's a summary of all the changes made: ### 1. PNG instead of BLP - **`src/utils/blp.ts`** — Updated `loadBlpDataUrl` and `loadBlpImage` to detect standard image formats (`.png`, `.jpg`, etc.) and return the URL directly without BLP decoding. - **`src/hooks/useBlpTexture.ts`** — Updated `useBlpTexture` hook to return PNG paths immediately (no async fetch/decode needed for standard image formats). - **`src/utils/assets.ts`** — Changed **every** asset path from `.blp` to `.png` (all bars, buttons, tooltips, borders, etc.). ### 2. New `/assets/` folder instead of `/buttons/` - Created `/assets/` directory with subdirectories: `command/`, `bars/`, `loading/`, `glue/`, `campaign/`, `tooltips/`, `resources/`, `editbox/`, `scrollbar/`, `slider/`, `checkbox/`, `radio/`, `popup/`, `borders/`, `esc/{human,orc,nightelf,undead}/`. - Copied existing PNGs (`cursor.png`, `Cursor2.png`, `command/BTNMove.png`, `command/border.png`) from `buttons/` to `assets/`. - All paths in `assets.ts` now point to `/assets/` instead of `/buttons/`, `/bars/`, `/borders/`, etc. ### 3. Cursor fix - **`src/wc3.css`** — Changed `--wc3-game-cursor: auto` to `--wc3-game-cursor: url("/assets/cursor.png"), auto`. This fixes the cursor because previously the CSS `!important` rule on `body, body *` was overriding the inline style in `App.tsx`. Now the cursor is set via the CSS custom property, which the `!important` rule propagates correctly. - **`wc3.css` (root built copy)** — Same cursor path update from `./buttons/Cursor2.png` to `/assets/cursor.png`. ### 4. Demo (`demo/App.tsx`) - Removed the inline cursor hack (`style={{ cursor: "url(../buttons/cursor.png), auto" }}`). - Updated all command button icon paths from `.blp` / `../buttons/` to `/assets/*.png`. - Removed stray `
